children.heading: .—Appointment of Inspector General
children.label: a .—Appointment of Inspector General
children.text: There shall be an Inspector General for the Commissions appointed in accordance with . All of the Commissions shall be subject to a single Inspector General.section 403(a) of title 5

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: A Commission shall maintain accurate and complete records of all its transactions and activities.

children.heading: .—Availability
children.label: 2 .—Availability
children.text: All records of a Commission shall be available for audit and examination by the Inspector General (including authorized representatives of the Inspector General).

children.heading: Records of Recipients of Commission Assistance.—
children.label: c Records of Recipients of Commission Assistance.—

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: A recipient of funds from a Commission under this subtitle shall maintain accurate and complete records of transactions and activities financed with the funds and report to the Commission on the transactions and activities.

children.heading: .—Availability
children.label: 2 .—Availability
children.text: All records required under paragraph (1) shall be available for audit by the Commission and the Inspector General (including authorized representatives of the Commission and the Inspector General).

children.heading: .—Annual Audit
children.label: d .—Annual Audit
children.text: The Inspector General shall audit the activities, transactions, and records of each Commission on an annual basis.
